summary: Phase 58 testing completed - PDF Overlay Service Enhanced (ReportLab path) fixes verified. All 15 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to no templates in test tenant). Code review confirms signature aspect-fit + alignment, date format parsing + alignment, radio no-label, checkbox conditional label, and initials aspect-fit + alignment are all implemented correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: 1. _draw_signature_field: Uses ImageReader.getSize() for aspect ratio, computes fit_w/fit_h, aligns per field.style.textAlign (left/center/right)
2. _draw_initials_field: Same aspect-fit + alignment logic as signature
3. _draw_date_field: Parses stored value via datetime, reformats per field.dateFormat (MM/DD/YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, MMM DD, YYYY), uses _draw_text_with_style for alignment
4. _draw_radio_field: Only selected option drawn (both legacy + new groupName paths), label intentionally NOT drawn
5. _draw_checkbox_field: Label drawn ONLY when checkboxLabel is set AND hideLabelOnFinal!=true
7. FONT_MAP: CSS to ReportLab font mapping (Arial→Helvetica, Times New Roman→Times-Roman, etc.)
- package_public_routes.py: Phase 56 radio no-label comment present (line 783)
- package_public_link_routes.py: Phase 56 radio no-label comment present
- Frontend InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Phase 57 radio circle-only, signature/initials alignment
- Frontend PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js: Phase 56 aspect-fit + alignment, radio no-label

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI loads correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 58 fixes verified via code review tests. The pdf_overlay_service_enhanced.py (ReportLab path) now has: (1) signature/initials aspect-fit + alignment, (2) date format parsing + alignment, (3) radio selected-only + no-label, (4) checkbox conditional label. Test tenant has 0 templates so end-to-end PDF generation could not be tested, but code review confirms all Phase 58 requirements are implemented. Previous iterations 1-16 covered package signing flow (PyMuPDF path) and frontend paths.

signature_aspect_fit_alignment.details: _draw_signature_field uses ImageReader.getSize() for aspect ratio, computes fit_w/fit_h, aligns per textAlign

initials_aspect_fit_alignment.details: _draw_initials_field has same aspect-fit + alignment logic as signature

date_format_alignment.details: _draw_date_field parses via datetime, reformats per dateFormat, uses _draw_text_with_style for alignment

radio_selected_only_no_label.details: _draw_radio_field draws only selected option, 'Label intentionally NOT drawn' comment present

checkbox_conditional_label.details: _draw_checkbox_field draws label ONLY when checkboxLabel set AND hideLabelOnFinal!=true

regression_checks.frontend_interactive_viewer: PASS - Phase 57 radio circle-only, alignment via textAlign
regression_checks.frontend_public_document_view: PASS - Phase 56 aspect-fit + alignment, radio no-label
